Collecting Science Cores in highlighted Rooms will award XP. Some rooms now have multiple Cores! Once you collect all Cores of one color, new ones may appear. You can also earn XP in public rooms or by collecting Cores with friends.
Use the Boost to level up faster! The Boost will multiply the XP you have gained from recent time spent in Rec Room. 900 XP is the max amount that can be gained by purchasing the Boost.

Help us test increased Ink limits in your rooms and new performance gauges on the MakerPen UI by enabling Limits 2.0!

Rooms 2.0 enables you to create higher quality rooms than ever before. However, there are a few things you should know before creating one.
    • This is an ALPHA release, so you may lose content, experience weird behaviors, etc.
    • Not every feature in Rooms 1.0 will be available in Rooms 2.0
        • Inventions are temporarily disabled
    • Rooms 2.0 introduces powerful new features like:
        • Compound Objects
        • MUCH higher creation limit
        • Player Properties (replaces Roles)
